mapper.select: SELECT w.id, w.student_id, w.question_id, w.exam_id, w.exam_paper_id, w.first_wrong_time, w.last_wrong_time, w.wrong_count, w.latest_answer, w.mastered_status, w.mastered_time, w.note_text, q.title AS question_title, q.question_type AS question_type, q.correct_answer AS correct_answer, q.answer_analysis AS answer_analysis FROM wrong_question_book w LEFT JOIN question q ON w.question_id = q.id WHERE w.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY w.last_wrong_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM wrong_question_book WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_question_book SET mastered_status = #{masteredStatus}, mastered_time = NOW()NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE wrong_question_book SET mastered_status = #{masteredStatus}, mastered_time = NOW()NULL WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.select: SELECT q.question_type AS questionType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM wrong_question_book w JOIN question q ON w.question_id = q.id WHERE w.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY q.question_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question_book (student_id, question_id, exam_id, exam_paper_id, first_wrong_time, last_wrong_time, wrong_count, latest_answer, mastered_status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{questionId}, #{examId}, #{examPaperId}, NOW(), NOW(), 1, #{latestAnswer}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE last_wrong_time = NOW(), wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, latest_answer = #{latestAnswer}, mastered_status = 0
